revision.comment: configuration data for [[Module:Find sources]]
fix comment
use MediaWiki-message-style keys

Protected Module:Find sources/config: [[WP:High-risk templates|High-risk Lua module]] ([Edit=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite) [Move=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite))

Changed protection settings for "[[Module:Find sources/config]]": dropping per request of EXCON editor ([Edit=Require extended confirmed access] (indefinite) [Move=Require template editor access] (indefinite))

Changed protection settings for "[[Module:Find sources/config]]": [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]] Lots more transclusions due to inclusion in Talk header a year ago. ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require template editor access] (indefinite))
1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Module:Find_sources/config]]: importing for the list. This is a canonical list of Shrines to work with

1 revision imported: importing this file, and also doing a full refresh import of all dependencies, because I am concerned this is one with a lot of broken dependencies. Intended end result is the template [[Template:Talk page header]] which is gonna be highly customized to our usage later on
